description_long: This is a vintage-style coupe car with a streamlined, elongated body and a glossy dark blue finish. The vehicle features a prominent front grille with horizontal chrome bars, rounded fenders, and classic circular headlights. The side profile reveals four doors, whitewall tires, and chrome hubcaps, with subtle trim details along the body. The windows are relatively small and rectangular, with a continuous roofline that gently slopes toward the rear. The rear of the car includes a simple bumper and a trunk area, with minimal ornamentation. The overall design evokes the aesthetic of 1930s to 1940s American automobiles, combining elegance with robust construction.
description: A vintage dark blue coupe car with a streamlined body, chrome accents, and whitewall tires, reminiscent of 1930s-1940s American automotive design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide chrome grille, rounded headlights, and the car's gently curved hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, four doors, whitewall tires, and chrome hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple bumper, trunk area, and the car's overall rounded rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the same door and window configuration, tires, and trim details.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
